subcodes.first_line: O Rubin! The Manifest Truth proclaimeth: Today the springtime of the All-Merciful hath appeared and fresh saplings have sprouted forth through the hand of cultivation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا روبین حق مبین میفرماید امروز ربیع رحمن ظاهر و نهالهای جدیده که از ید تربیت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual springtime, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
